videoSnippet.title: A Glorious Batlle || Nodirbek Abdusattorov vs Anish Giri || GCT Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2820) - Firouzja, Alireza (2791)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [18] 2026.07.04
C85 Ruy Lopez, Exchange variation doubly deferred (DERLD)

1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 Bf5 4.g4 Bg6 5.Ne2 c5 6.h4 Nc6 7.h5 Be4 8.Rh3 h6 9.e6 fxe6 10.Nbc3 Bh7 11.dxc5 d4 12.Na4 Nb4 13.Bg2 Nxc2+ 14.Kf1 Nxa1 15.c6 bxc6 16.Nc5 Qd6 17.Ne4 Qb4 18.Nf4 e5 19.Ng6 Bxg6 20.hxg6 Qc4+ 21.Kg1 Qc2 22.Qe1 Nf6 23.Bd2 Rb8 24.g5 Nd5 25.Qxa1 Rxb2 26.Rb3 Rxb3 27.axb3 hxg5 28.Qa6 Kd7 29.Qb7+ Nc7 30.Ba5 Qb1+ 31.Bf1 Qxe4 32.Qxc7+ Ke6 33.Bg2 Qb1+ 34.Bf1 Rh1+ 35.Kxh1 Qxf1+ 36.Kh2 Qxf2+ 37.Kh1 Qf1+ 38.Kh2 Qe2+ 39.Kg1 Qd1+ 40.Kh2 Qc2+ 41.Kg1 Qxg6 42.Qxc6+ Kf7 43.Qd5+ Qe6 44.Qf3+ Kg8 45.Qe4 a6 46.Bd2 g6 47.Bxg5 Qf5 48.Qd5+ e6 49.Qd8 d3 50.Be7 e4 51.Kg2 Qf3+ 52.Kh2 Qf2+ 53.Kh3 Qf5+ 54.Kg2 e3 55.Bxf8 Qxf8 56.Qxd3 Qf2+ 57.Kh1 Qf3+ 58.Kh2 Qf4+ 59.Kg2 Qg4+ 60.Kh2 Qh5+ 61.Kg3 Qe5+ 62.Kh4
